dsl_rule.translation_notes: Converted 'price closes near upper end of range' to close >= R1 and close <= 9640 (resistance level). 'Confluence of 20MA and 50MA around pivot' translated to sma_20 <= pivot as alignment condition. Entry range 9,630-9,640 approximated as closure between R1 and 9640. Stop loss set at 0.15% (9,640-9,650 range ~0.10% above entry). Exit at previous low approximated as close < S1 (pivot support level). 'Failed breakout' and 'initial weakness' conditions cannot be explicitly coded without multi-bar pattern recognition, but are captured by the price action and MA confluence rules.

source_rule_text: Sell from the top end of a range when price closes near the upper end after a failed breakout attempt, targeting the previous low when confluence of moving averages and pivot level align with initial weakness.
